name: Royal Coconut Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, soda, and salt into a bowl.
2. Add sugars, butter, egg, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Beat until smooth, about 2 minutes.
3. Stir in oats and coconut.
4. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
5. Place cookies on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 12 to 15 minutes, or until set.
